title: DRW MD-DRW-503: Battery Bay Assembly
text:
Drawing MD-DRW-503 Rev C — Battery Bay Assembly

## Notes

1. All dimensions in millimetres unless stated.
2. Surface finish: Ra 3.2 unless noted.
3. Parts referenced: P-1061, P-1063, P-1067, P-1017, P-1079.
4. Drawn by Rowan Ellery, checked by Tobias Wren, approved by Dr. Rhea Voss.
